task: place rxbar blueberry into bottom drawer
raw:
Scene: rxbar_blueberry, bottom_drawer, table, bowl, box
Step 1: reach(rxbar_blueberry)
  affordance_region: the rxbar blueberry on the table
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, rxbar_blueberry, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, rxbar_blueberry) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(rxbar_blueberry)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the rxbar blueberry
  contact: holding(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(rxbar_blueberry)
Step 3: transport(rxbar_blueberry -> bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: the empty area at the bottom of the drawer
  spatial: above(rxbar_blueberry, bottom_drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(rxbar_blueberry)
  done_when: above(rxbar_blueberry, bottom_drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(rxbar_blueberry -> bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: the empty area at the bottom of the drawer
  contact: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, bottom_drawer) [completion]; released(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  pose: stable(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, bottom_drawer) AND released(rxbar_blueberry) AND stable(rxbar_blueberry)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rxbar blueberry on the table
the top surface of the rxbar blueberry
the empty area at the bottom of the drawer
the empty area at the bottom of the drawer
steps.done_when: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, bottom_drawer) AND released(rxbar_blueberry) AND stable(rxbar_blueberry)
